svg.text: Sky (Faux Leather) | Closed Base | 3 Concave Niches + 4 Peaks | ~433 cm
Reinforcement: Steel L-brackets at all joints + wood glue D3
Continuous curved form: CNC-cut plywood ribs following sinusoidal profile
Seat foam: 8cm dual-layer (5cm HD35 + 3cm soft top)
Cover: Sky 1.0-1.2mm, UV-resistant, stapled to plywood frame
4x Curved wood fills (birch plywood, sinusoidal) between sofa back and wall
2x Plant pots on wood fills (at peak 2 and peak 3)
3x Round cafe tables (diameter 56cm) at niche positions
Form: continuous sinusoidal (3 concave niches + 4 peaks)
Wave amplitude: 25 cm (50 cm total depth)
Seat cushion: 8 cm (seat surface at ~51 cm)
